summary: Freeform text summary of the problems with the inefficiencies or failure modes in the trace: The system eventually found the right papers, but it was inefficient because WebSurfer hit an initial browser error, the orchestrator repeated essentially the same request several times, and there was weak/no explicit verification before the final answer (e.g., repeated retries to open the 2016 arXiv page and then outputting “egalitarian, hierarchical” without checking which single word the question asked for).
raw:
A. Freeform text summary of the problems with the inefficiencies or failure modes in the trace: The system eventually found the right papers, but it was inefficient because WebSurfer hit an initial browser error, the orchestrator repeated essentially the same request several times, and there was weak/no explicit verification before the final answer (e.g., repeated retries to open the 2016 arXiv page and then outputting “egalitarian, hierarchical” without checking which single word the question asked for).
B. Whether the task is successfully completed or not: no
